# Jarvis AI Desktop Agent

> Autonomous open-source AI desktop agent for Linux with multi-LLM support, desktop control via VNC, WhatsApp integration, and extensible skill system.

## Overview

Jarvis is a self-hosted AI agent that runs on any Linux server. It provides a full desktop environment accessible via web browser, controlled by LLMs like Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, or local models via Ollama. Built with Python/FastAPI backend and vanilla JavaScript frontend.

## Key Features

- **Desktop Control**: Full Linux desktop via Xvfb/VNC, controlled by the AI agent in real-time
- **Multi-LLM Support**: Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, OpenRouter (300+ models), any OpenAI-compatible API, local models via Ollama/LM Studio
- **Multi-Agent Orchestration**: Main agent can spawn autonomous sub-agents for parallel task execution
- **RAG Knowledge Base**: Document search (PDF, DOCX, TXT, Excel, PPTX) with TF-IDF and ChromaDB vector database (automatic scaling with sentence-transformer embeddings)
- **MCP Integration**: Model Context Protocol support for external tool servers via stdio or HTTP/SSE transport
- **WhatsApp Integration**: Bidirectional messaging via Baileys, voice transcription with faster-whisper
- **OpenClaw Skill Marketplace**: Import community skills from ClawHub, auto-convert to native Jarvis tools
- **Face Recognition**: Real-time face detection and recognition using dlib/face_recognition with configurable actions
- **Browser Automation**: CDP-based browser control with xdotool fallback
- **Telemetry & Tracing**: Built-in OpenTelemetry tracing for agent runs, tool calls, and LLM interactions
- **Auto-Learning**: Automatically saves successful strategies after trial-and-error, learns user preferences from corrections
- **Custom Instructions**: User-defined Markdown files loaded into every conversation as system prompt extensions, editable via web UI

## Tech Stack

- Backend: Python 3.13, FastAPI, uvicorn, HTTPS
- Frontend: Vanilla JavaScript, Dark Glassmorphism Theme, WebSocket
- Desktop: Xvfb, Cinnamon/Openbox, x11vnc, noVNC
- Database: ChromaDB (vector), JSON (memory/settings)
- WhatsApp: Node.js, Baileys v7, faster-whisper

## Installation

Docker:
```
docker pull ghcr.io/dev-core-busy/jarvis:master
```

Install script (Debian/Ubuntu/Fedora/Arch):
```
curl -fsSL https://jarvis-ai.info/install.sh | bash
```

Updates: Re-run the same install script – it auto-detects existing installations.

## Links

- Website: https://jarvis-ai.info
- GitHub: https://github.com/dev-core-busy/jarvis
